# Box3D public B3_API coverage classification for boxddd.
# Format: symbol|status|area|header|note
# status must be one of: safe, raw, omitted, deferred.
# Keep this file deterministic; boxddd/tests/api_coverage.rs validates it against vendored headers.
b3SetAllocator|raw|base|base.h|process-global, file IO, debug dump, or raw pointer policy
b3GetByteCount|safe|core|base.h|covered by current safe wrapper implementation
b3SetAssertFcn|raw|base|base.h|process-global, file IO, debug dump, or raw pointer policy
b3InternalAssert|raw|base|base.h|process-global, file IO, debug dump, or raw pointer policy
b3SetLogFcn|raw|base|base.h|process-global, file IO, debug dump, or raw pointer policy
b3GetVersion|safe|core|base.h|covered by current safe wrapper implementation
b3IsDoublePrecision|safe|core|base.h|covered by current safe wrapper implementation
b3GetTicks|raw|base|base.h|process-global, file IO, debug dump, or raw pointer policy
b3GetMilliseconds|raw|base|base.h|process-global, file IO, debug dump, or raw pointer policy
b3GetMillisecondsAndReset|raw|base|base.h|process-global, file IO, debug dump, or raw pointer policy
b3Yield|raw|base|base.h|process-global, file IO, debug dump, or raw pointer policy
b3Sleep|raw|base|base.h|process-global, file IO, debug dump, or raw pointer policy
b3Hash|raw|base|base.h|process-global, file IO, debug dump, or raw pointer policy
b3WriteBinaryFile|raw|base|base.h|process-global, file IO, debug dump, or raw pointer policy
b3ReadBinaryFile|raw|base|base.h|process-global, file IO, debug dump, or raw pointer policy
b3CreateWorld|safe|world|box3d.h|covered by current safe wrapper implementation
b3DestroyWorld|safe|world|box3d.h|covered by current safe wrapper implementation
b3GetWorldCount|omitted|core|box3d.h|diagnostic global not part of the safe ownership model
b3GetMaxWorldCount|omitted|core|box3d.h|diagnostic global not part of the safe ownership model
